subject: [DCAEGEN2] Ves-open-api Add mech to load config at deploy time
commit_message:
[DCAEGEN2] Ves-open-api Add mech to load config at deploy time

Enable configuration ves-open-api by Helm values

Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-3316
Signed-off-by: Tomasz Wrobel <tomasz.wrobel@nokia.com>
Change-Id: If6e70d63f961aaa7d26e1680f7bb917cf4de3546
